summary: The document outlines a cold calling script for contacting GP practices in Manchester to pitch KeepMeCompany's AI anamnesis service, including specific dialogue for handling receptionists. It also lists interview questions for a Sales & Business Development role, focusing on industry knowledge, tech aptitude, and resilience. This material reflects the company's go-to-market strategy and hiring criteria for expanding into NHS practices.
